Boy, æt. 7, affected since birth ; impetigo capitis. Girl, æt. 7, scrofulous, frequently troubled with cutaneous eruptions and inflammation of eye, since her vaccination ; scrofulous ophthalmia. Boy, æt. 7, suffering three years ; sinus before left ear. Girl, æt. 7, after a blow upon head when three years old ; incontinence of urine. Girl, æt. 7, blonde, blue eyes, four weeks ago had pleurisy ; compression of lung after exudation and curvature of spine. Boy, æt. 8 ; eczema capitis. Girl, æt. 8, had scarlatina six years ago, since then affected ; otorrhœa. Boy, æt. 10, after vaccination ; spasms. Boy, æt. 11, tall ; phthisis. Scrofulous child, æt. 11 ; swelling on chest. Girl, æt. 11 ; swelling of knee. Boy, æt. 12 ; caries of mastoid process. Boy, æt. 12 ; palpitation of heart. N., æt. 12, cachectic and anemic ; fistulæ of thigh. Girl, æt. 13, scrofulous ; caries of bones of leg. Girl, æt. 14, blonde, pale, phlegmatic, short in stature, corpulent ; keloid on temporal region. Girl, æt. 14, suffering four months ; caries of orbit. Boy, æt. 14 ; caries of metacarpal bones. Boy, æt. 15, suffering ever since his recollection ; nocturnal enuresis. Boy, æt. 15, suffering two years ; necrosis of femur. Boy, æt. 15, laborer ; acne. Girl, æt. 16 ; eruption on occiput. Girl, æt. 16, servant, after a fall eleven months previously ; affection of spine and sacrum. Boy, æt. 16, lymphatic temperament, from a bruise, eighteen months since ; suppuration of leg. Boy, æt. 16, after revaccination ; convulsions. Boy, æt. 17, farmer, light complexion, blue eyes, scrofulous during childhood, about nine months ago had typhoid pneumonia, has been suffering four months ; abdominal dropsy. Girl, æt. 17 ; goitre. Girl, æt. 17, after some boils on back had healed, a year ago ; eczema squamosum. Girl, æt. 18 ; mental disturbance. Miss B., æt. 18, suffering many months ; headache. Negro, æt. 18 ; contraction of fingers. Girl, æt. 18, strong ; caries of tibia. Girl, æt. 18, phlegmatic, torpid disposition, mind poorly developed, subject to skin eruptions ; hysteria. Girl, æt. 20, suffering for weeks ; hard swelling of cheek. Girl, æt. 20 ; epilepsy. Girl, æt. 21, nine months ago had nephritis, since then suffering ; hepatic disorder. Man, æt. 21, pale, transparent skin, suffering eight months ; fistula in leg. Man, æt. 23, light complexion ; seminal emissions. Woman, æt. 23, single, suffering five years ; epilepsy. Woman, æt. 24, married six months ; vaginismus. Man, æt. 24 ; phthisis. Governess, æt. 24 ; housemaid's knee. Woman, æt. 25, brunette ; swelling of eyelid. Miss A., æt. 26, lymphatic and delicate, suffering two years ; inflammation of nasal duct. Mrs. H., æt. 26, mother of three children, suffering since birth of last child, three months ago ; constipation. Mrs. C., æt. 26, has had two children ; periuterine cellulitis. Woman, æt. 26, single ; pain in leg. Housemaid, æt. 26, suffering eighteen months ; bursitis. Mme P., æt. 26, delicate health, suffering three years ; abscess of foot. Country-woman, æt. 26 ; elephantiasis. Woman, æt. 28, single, brunette, suffering a long time, headache. Mrs. K., æt. 28, suffering four months ; recurrent phlyctenular conjunctivitis. Woman, æt. 29 ; chronic headache. Mrs. T., æt. 29 ; ulceration of cornea. Man, æt. 30, sanguine bilious temperament, five feet ten inches high, weight in health 160, family consumptive, two sisters and a brother having died of this disease ; phthisis. Woman, æt. 30, suffering since death of her husband, six years ago ; epilepsy. Woman, æt. 30 ; epilepsy. Woman, æt. 32, blonde, sanguine temperament, formerly had scrofulous ophthalmia ; eruption about mouth. Man, æt. 32, in good health, a little pale, habitually sad and anxious, having lost his father at the age of 60 from cancer of face ; threatened cancer. Woman, æt. 33, single ; tumor albus. Man, æt. 34 ; abscess of ankle and foot with caries. Man, æt. 36, four months ago cut leg with an axe, since then suffering ; chronic suppuration. Man, æt. 37, cigarmaker, after attack of typhoid fever ; abscess. Lady, æt. 40, school-teacher, single ; vertigo. Woman, æt. 40 ; swelling of lachrymal sac. Mrs. M., æt. 40 ; inflammation of lachrymal sac. Woman, æt. 40, suffering seven months ; cancer of tongue. Man, æt. 40, face somewhat yellowish, with red cheeks, suffering six years ; gastric disorder. Woman, æt. 40, weakly constitution, subject to catarrhal affections, somewhat asthmatic ; scirrhus mamma. Mrs. B., æt. 42, strong, well nourished ; headache. Woman, æt. 44, married, medium stature, weak constitution, light complexion, still menstruates regularly, has been cured of catarrh of stomach, and psoriasis diffusa ; parenchymatous iritis. Green-grocer, æt. 45 ; enlarged bursa over left knee. Mrs. H., æt. 47 ; scirrhus mamma. Man, æt. 48, ten years ago saw a cancer of nose, since then affected ; itching of nose. Woman, æt. 50, married, Irish ; eczema capitis. Man, æt. 50, large, apparently good constitution ; pain in lung. Miss M., æt. 55, suffering for a year ; tumor in mouth. Man, æt. 55, suffering five days ; felon on finger. Mrs. G., æt. 55 ; glass in finger. Man, æt. 55, in good health, after wearing tight boots ; ulcer on foot. Man, æt. 60, formerly suffering from glandular swellings ; induration of cheek. Man, æt. 60 ; tumor in breast. Mrs. P., æt. 60, tall, dark complexion, dark hair, rather masculine appearance, predisposed to lung disease ; cough for several weeks. Woman, æt. 60 ; carbuncle on neck. Woman, over 60, in moderately good health ; elephantiasis. Madam X. de Cerveirac, æt. 61, enjoying good health, never been seriously sick, melancholic disposition ; cancer of lip. Mme. C., æt. 63, apparently in good health but having a leaden-hued, earthy complexion, for about twenty years ; lupus. Man, æt. 67, syphilitic ; inguinal abscess and hernia. Lady, æt. 70 ; scirrhus mamma. Woman, æt. 80, after a sprain ; inflammation of foot. Young lady ; tumor of lip. Young woman, delicate health, pale, earthy complexion, suffering a month ; panaritium. Washerwoman, fat, robust, brown complexion, standing much in cold water ; metrorrhagia. Mrs. J., mother of four children, apparently healthy, suffering several months ; constipation. Robust, middle-aged man, bitten in thumb by a man four weeks ago ; swelling and suppuration of thumb. Lady, ten years past climacteric ; leucorrhœa.

nose.text: NOSE. ► *A smarting, painful scab deep in the right nostril , [1] . ► Constant sneezing, but she cannot do it satisfactorily, [32] . ► Frequent sneezing in the afternoon and following forenoon (after five days), [8] . ► *Frequent sneezing (after thirty-six hours), [1] . [420.] ► A sneezing cold, lasting several days, [29] . ► *Frequent, but usually ineffectual, efforts to sneeze (after twenty-eight, and forty-eight hours), [7] . ► Coryza (eighth day), [18] . ► Constant coryza, [36] . ► Coryza and cough, with swelling of the submaxillary glands, pain in the throat on swallowing, great chilliness; she was obliged to lie down; an hour afterwards, in bed, burning heat over the whole body, [1] . ► *Fluent coryza (after five, six, and twelve days), [1] . ► *Violent coryza for several weeks (first days), [1] . ► Profuse coryza (after a few hours), [1] . ► *Dry coryza (seventh day), [19] . ► *Dry coryza; could not get air through the nose (tenth day), [19] . [430.] ► Dry coryza, with rough voice (after one hour and a half), [8] . ► *She could not get rid of a catarrh, that was at one time dry, at another fluent , [1] . ► Dry catarrh, in the morning on waking, [3] . ► *Discharge of much mucus from the nose, without coryza , [1] . ► Profuse, thick, mucous discharge from the nose (eighth day), [23] . ► *Much acrid water runs from the nose, without coryza, making the nose sore and bloody internally and externally , together with the odor of blood or of freshly slaughtered animals, for five days, [1] . ► Stuffed sensation in and running from the nose, as if he had a cold in his head, [29] . ► Nose and eyes water, [29] . ► Violent nosebleed during dinner; the blood flowed from the right nostril, was profuse, dark red, followed by relief of the headache (tenth day), [18a] . ► Profuse nosebleed (after twenty hours), [1] . [440.] ► Drops of blood fall from the nose at times, only on stooping, [1] . ► Bleeding from the nose, [35] ; (first days), [1] . ► *Nosebleed after inserting the finger, with dryness of the nose , [1] . ► Blowing of bloody mucus from the nose, [1] . ► *Complete stoppage of the nose , so that she could scarcely speak; was obliged to keep the mouth open to breathe (after twelve hours), [1] . ► Nose somewhat stopped (fourth day), [23] . ► Obstruction of the nose in the morning, followed by coryza during the after part of the day, [32] . ► Pressure over the nose, in the morning, [1] . ► Biting pains, as if ulcerating, about the nostrils, streaming up into the brain, causing a tense, throbbing pain in the forehead; tip of the nose very painful to touch, as if suppurating, for two days (after ten days), [1] . ► *Soreness on the back of the nose, as if the nasal bone had been beaten (second day), [16] . [450.] ► Tearing in the left wing of the nose, [3] . ► *Drawing in the root of the nose and in the right malar bone , [3] . ► Fine drawing tearing in the nose, [3] . ► Painfulness of the septum of the nose, [1] . ► Burning-shooting pains in tip of nose, flying up to the forehead, [32] . ► A burning stitch on the side of the nose, [1] . ► Crawling and burrowing in the tip of the nose, [1] . ► Itching and sore pain in the furrow behind the ring of the nose (without soreness), [1] . ► *Itching in the nose , [3] ; (twenty-sixth day), [25] . ► Smell excessively (curative action), [1] .

Loss of smell. Smell of blood, or of recently slaughtered animals. θ Chronic coryza. Fetor from nose. θ Nasal catarrh. Nosebleed. Complete stoppage of nose, could scarcely speak. Soreness on back of nose as if nasal bone had been beaten. Drawing in root of nose and in right malar bone. Itching in nose. Much sneezing, sometimes ineffectual ; with acrid coryza. Painful dryness of nose. Troublesome itching, feeling of dryness in nose extending to forehead and antrum ; periosteum is affected. Dryness and stoppage after checked foot sweat. Long-continued stoppage of nose from hardened mucus. Coryza : fluent ; violent for several weeks ; dry, could not get air through nose ; long-lasting, oft returning ; acrid, corroding ; chronic, with swelling of mucous membrane ; constant. Nose stuffed up, or alternately dry and fluent ; obstructed mornings, fluent during day. With every fresh cold, stoppage and acrid discharge ; makes inner nose sore and bloody. Obstruction of nose in morning, followed by coryza during day. Discharge of acrid water from nose, making inner nose and nostrils sore and bloody. θ Chronic coryza. Food and drink rise into choanæ. Nose inwardly dry, excoriated, covered with crusts. Swelling of nasal mucous membrane. θ Chronic coryza. A smarting, painful scab deep in right nostril. Gnawing and ulcers high up in nose, with great sensitiveness of place to contact. Sore, painful scabs below septum of nose, with sticking pain when touched. Ozæna with fetid, offensive discharge when the affection is seated in submucous connective tissue or in periosteum. Offensive smelling nasal catarrh ; every morning blows from nose hard, dry masses of mucus, followed by a quantity of offensive-smelling pus ; headache ; lassitude ; loss of appetite ; miserable appearance ; profuse, offensive-smelling foot sweat ; excoriation between toes when walking much. Chronic catarrh : with stoppage of nose, loss of smell and taste ; slimy, tough, purulent secretion stopping frequently in morning ; swelling of nasal membrane ; chronic inflammation of tonsils and painless swelling of submaxillary glands ; tough slime in fauces, with hoarseness and rough cough ; stoppage in morning followed by thick, green-yellow fetid masses after getting up ; frontal sinuses inflamed, with pounding and throbbing pain in forehead ; fauces dry and painful ; uvula swollen ; Eustachian tubes itching ; chronic inflammation of tonsils and swelling of submaxillary glands. Miss A., æt. 26, lymphatic and delicate, suffers since two years from inflammation of nasal duct, discharging large clots of blood mixed with dry mucus of a very foul smell ; corner of eye red, oculo-palpebral mucous membrane slightly inflamed and itching, sac on left side swollen so that the sore appears larger ; frontal headache. Caries of nasal bones from syphilis or scrofulosis. Intolerable itching of tip of nose. Man, æt. 48, ten years ago was much shocked on seeing tip of a friend's nose destroyed by cancer ; since then his own has itched intolerably, < when thinking of it, and often keeping him awake at night. Voluptuous itching about nose obliges constant rubbing in evening. Tip of nose red. Nose cold. Herpetic eruption around nostrils and lips. Burning, shooting pains in tip of nose flying up to forehead. Tetters on nose (after Calc. ostr.).
Itching at point of nose. Dry, hard crusts form, bleeding when loosened. Nasal bones sensitive. Sneezing in morning. Obstructed and loss of smell. Perforation of septum

face.text: FACE. [460.] ► Swelling of the face, lips, and submaxillary glands, with chilliness and icy-cold feet, [1] . ► She is very pale, as after a long illness, for several days (after three days), [8] . ► Paleness of the face, [1] ; (first and seventh days), [18] . ► Her face burned painfully, [32] . ► Cheeks. ► Drawing pain in the bones of the cheeks and behind the ear, worse on touch, [1] . ► Two painful tearings in the left cheek extended upward, in the forenoon, during the menses (tenth day), [8] . ► Tearing in both cheeks for four hours, followed by a sensation as if the left molars were on edge, [6] . ► Lips. ► Swelling of the upper lip and gum, very painful to touch, [1] . ► Great swelling of the lower lip for two days (after seventeen days), [1] . ► *A very painful pimple on the margin of the red of the lower lip , [1] . [470.] ► Blisters, with smarting pain in the red of the upper lip, [1] . ► Blisters on the margin of the red of the upper lip , at first with itching, then, when scabby, only smarting pain, [1] . ► Itching scab on the upper lip, in the margin of the red (after sixteen days), [1] . ► Lips dry and cracked, [13] . ► Dryness of the lips, [38] ; (fifth day), [18] . ► Lips feel much parched; soreness of the palate, [29] . ► Lips hot (seventh day), [15] . ► Jaws. ► Occasional aching in upper and lower jawbones, [29] . ► Aching of both jaws, [40] . ► Painful contractive cramp in the left submaxillary articulation, and afterwards in the temple, [3] . [480.] ► Bruised pain in the articulation of the jaw, in front of the left ear, when touched and on chewing, [1] . ► Tension in the articulation of the jaw (immediately), [16] . ► Pressive pain in the angle of the lower jaw, extending into the ear, while yawning, [1] .

Face : pale ; cachectic, body cool, sweaty ; earthy ; yellow, distorted ; waxy ; white and red spots. Paleness of face before fainting. Pale, cachectic appearance. θ Eczema capitis. θ Cancer of lip. θ Panaritium. θ Coxalgia. θ Mastitis. θ Tumor of eye. θ Caries of tibia. Yellowish color of face. θ Gastralgia. θ Perforating ulcer of stomach. Face emaciated, pale, yellowish. θ Abscess of left arm after dissecting wound. Rhagades about lids and lips. Skin of face cracks. Acne on forehead and back of hands. Face distorted, eyes closed. Neuralgia of face, head, eyes, teeth and ears ; pains < after being in bed a short time. Boring, tearing pains day and night, < during night, spreading over whole chest, also in bones of face. Prosopalgia ; with hemorrhoids ; with affection of periosteum ; itching, with sensation of dryness in inner nose, extends into frontal cavities and antrum ; with small lumps and nodules on scalp and face. Large hives on face and body before appearance of caries on lower jaw ; after caries got well, vesicles appeared on whole body, with fever. A thick crop of papules on forehead, face and back of both hands. θ Acne. Slight papular eruption upon forehead, similar to varicella. θ Pertussis. An induration extending from left corner of mouth to a great portion of cheek. Induration of cellular tissue on one side of face, after parulis. Lupus ; serrated ulcers, with greyish purulent surfaces ; corroding, threatening to perforate cheek. Lupus ; whole face corroded ; tubercles on face, with ulceration of their apices ; suppressed perspiration of feet (improved). Lupus in face, at interior extremity of cicatrix a deep ulcer threatening to perforate cheek, border of ulcer serrated, its surface greyish, bathed in a purulent sanies. Lupus in face, began on right ear lobe, healing one side, corroding on other, advancing downward and forward, leaving irregular cicatrix (after Bellad.). Comedones. Swelling on right cheek, made its appearance after scratching a pustule ; burning pain on centre of swelling formed a black vesicle which broke and discharged burning ichor. Red spots on cheeks with burning heat. Blood-boils on cheeks. Sycosis menti. Herpes on chin. Articulation of jaw spasmodically closed. Rheumatic pains in jaw and decayed teeth extending to temple. Aching of both jaws. Pricking and lancinating pains in region of right inferior maxillary, with cancerous diathesis. Pains more in jawbone than in teeth, swelling of jaw. Bony swelling of the inferior maxillary, size of half a walnut. Swelling and caries on lower jaw. Caries of left lower jaw. Necrosis of lower jaw. Boil on chin, with stinging pain when touched. Ulceration of corners of mouth. Painful ulcer in corner of mouth. Corner of mouth ulcerated with an itching sensation with scabs for many days. Nose and lips large, swollen and distorted. Dry and parched feeling of lips. Foam at mouth. θ Epilepsy. Swelling of lower lip. Blisters on margins of lips. Scabby eruption on lips, which smarts. Large, hard, brownish crusts on lips, especially about corners of mouth. Woman, æt. 61, cancer of lower lip after having picked lip. θ Cancer of lip. External third of lower lip on right side swollen and congested with an induration size of an apricot-stone in centre of swelling, on red border superficial ulceration with greyish base ; excruciating pain. θ Cancer of lower lip. For more than a month, felt an itching, sometimes burning, in a very circumscribed spot in a part of lower lip, finally succeeded by intolerable shooting pains ; a hard spot became perceptible in thickness of lip which soon made its appearance externally in shape of a conical pimple ; tumor soon became black, wrinkled and as large as a good-sized hazelnut. Cancer of lower lip ; ulcer greyish, superficial, excruciatingly painful. Painful or painless swelling of submaxillary glands.
Skin cracked on margin of lips. Eruption on chin. Facial neuralgia, throbbing, tearing, face red; worse, cold damp

mouth.text: MOUTH. ► Teeth. ► Teeth loose and sensitive when chewing, [1] . ► *The teeth become loose and the gum painful to the slightest pressure (sixteenth day), [12] . ► *Inflammation of a molar with swelling and soreness of the gum , [3] . ► All her teeth feel loose and elongated, [40] . ► Her teeth feel too large and long for her mouth, [23] . ► Teeth on edge for four weeks, [1] . ► Upper teeth on edge as from acids, [1] . [490.] ► Aching pain in all the teeth, [33] . ► Constant aching in all the teeth, [29] . ► A back tooth when biting pains as if ulcerating, [1] . ► Toothache in the morning on waking, lasting till shortly after rising, [1] . ► Dull pain, especially in the molars, after dinner and from drinking, [1] . ► Constant simple toothache; disappearing while eating; most violent at night, preventing sleep, [1] . ► Toothache after eating, [3] . ► Tensive toothache, [1] . ► Toothache mostly when eating warm food and on taking cold air into the mouth, [1] . ► The boy was attacked with a kind of teething fever; although he had all of his teeth he drooled, bored his hands into the mouth, and had heat in the head in the evening, [1] . [500.] ► A lower molar is painful, as if too long, [1] . ► Two painful jerkings in the right upper back teeth (first day), [8] . ► Violent toothache and pain in the whole lower jaw, pressure and jerking, so that he could not sleep the whole night, [1] . ► Violent pressure in a hollow tooth, [1] . ► Drawing pain in a hollow tooth, [1] . ► Drawing in a hollow tooth in paroxysms, [4] . ► Drawing in the lower incisors, [1] . ► Drawing-tearing toothache with soreness of the gums, [40] . ► Tearing toothache when eating, lasting a quarter of an hour afterwards, [1] . ► The boy was attacked with a kind of teething fever; although he had all of his teeth he drooled, bored his hands into the mouth, and had heat in the head in the evening, [1] . [510.] ► Sticking toothache, on account of which he could take nothing warm nor cold into the mouth, [1] . ► Sticking toothache, that did not permit him to sleep at night, with heat on the cheek; he could take nothing warm into the mouth, [1] . ► Shooting into one incisor while eating (after nineteen days), [1] . ► Stitches from a strong wind in a sound tooth, which was painful as from an ulcer, followed by swelling of the lower jaw (after eighteen days), [1] . ► Burning stitches in several teeth, which began to be painful after eating; the pain worse at night, aggravated by inhaling cold air, with heat of the head and burning in the cheeks, [1] . ► Gums. ► *Painful inflamed swelling of the gum (after six days), [1] . ► Swelling of the gum; warm drinks cause burning, and when chewing the gum is painful as if sore, [1] . ► The gums are quite inflamed, [29] . ► Several gum-boils, [33] . ► *Small gum-boil on the swollen gum , [2] . [520.] ► Sore, painful blisters on the gum and inside the lips, [1] . ► *Sore gum , [1] . ► The gums are very sore, [32] . ►► *The gum is painfully sensitive on taking cold water into the mouth , [1] . ► Cool feel in upper gums, [29] . ► Sensation of constriction in the gum immediately, [27] . ► Swelling of the right half of the tongue without pain (after five days), [1] . ► Tongue. ► Tongue coated, [3] , [13] . ► White-coated tongue in the morning (tenth day), [22] . ► Tongue very dry, with sensation as from pungent spices (eighteenth day), [14] . [530.] ► *Tongue feels sore (sixth day), [14] . ► Tongue sore with painful spots on the tip, [3] . ► Two or three times she had to wipe her tongue, fancying there was a hair on it, lying length ways, and coming up as it were from the windpipe, [32] . ►► *Sensation as if a hair were lying on the forepart of the tongue , [1] . ► *Sensation as if a hair were on the tip of the tongue and extended into the trachea, where it caused a crawling, so that he was frequently obliged to cough and hack (after ten days), [1] . ► Numbness of the tongue, [3] . ► General Mouth. ► *Bad odor from the mouth in the morning , almost like the salivation of mercury, [1] . ► *Painful ulcer in the corner of the mouth (after thirty-seven days), [1] . ► *Corner of the mouth ulcerated with an itching sensation, with scabs for many days (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► A fungoid ulcer on the inner surface of the lower lip, [1] . [540.] ► An ulcer on the palate reaching to the gum, [1] . ► The left sublingual gland was painful on deep pressure (third day), [25] . ► Great heat comes from the mouth, [1] . ► Slimy mouth with qualmishness in the morning after waking (seventh day), [8] . ► Acidity in the mouth always after eating (after three and ten days), [1] . ► Great dryness and some bitterness of the mouth with thirst (sixteenth day), [12] . ► Dryness of the mouth while walking in the open air, [1] . ► *Constant dryness of the mouth (after thirty hours), [1] . ► Mouth and lips seem dry, [1] . ► Constant dryness of the mouth, [40] . [550.] ► Dryness of the mouth without thirst, [33] . ► Mouth very dry, [32] . ► Soreness of the palate, which assumed a pale-yellow color, [37] . ► Soreness of the palate; lips feel much parched, [20] . ► Some stitches in the curtain of the palate, [1] . ► Itching on the hard and soft palate, [1] . ► Saliva. ► Water constantly collects in the mouth, is obliged to spit it out, [1] . ► Much saliva in the mouth (after eight days), [1] . ► Taste. ► Sense of taste and appetite become defective, [29] . ► Loss of taste and appetite, [32] . [560.] ► Bitterness in the mouth as if the stomach were foul, [20] . ► Bitter taste in the morning, [1] . ► Everything, even water, tastes bitter for several days (after three days), [8] . ► Bitter taste in the morning after rising (third day), [8] . ► Bitter mouth, [13] , [18] , [32] ; (sixteenth and twentieth day), [12] . ► Taste of blood in the mouth in the morning, [1] . ► Sour taste in the mouth with some bitterness, [1] . ► Metallic taste in the throat while sneezing (fifty-sixth day), [23] . ► Bad taste in the morning on waking, [3] . ► Filthy taste in the morning as of rotten eggs, [32] . [570.] ► Foul, clammy, and putrid taste, [40] . ► Taste as of soapsuds, [37] . ► Offensive, slimy taste in the mouth, [1] . ► Oily taste in the mouth (after a few hours), [1] . ► Taste of food in the mouth for a long time after eating, [1] .

throat.text: THROAT. ► Throat swollen and painful, [32] . ► Swelling of the thyroid cartilage; the spot itches, with sticking, when touched, [1] . ► Hawking of salt mucus, [3] . ► Frequent hawking of thick mucus (first day), [2] . ► *Hawking up of yellow, very offensive balls of mucus , [1] . [580.] ► Much mucus in the throat, which she was constantly obliged to hawk up (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► Rising of mucus in the throat, without cough (twenty-third day), [24] . ► Dryness of the throat, [32] . ► Dryness of the throat, as from a cold, [29] . ► Throat very dry, with hoarseness, and itching in the meatus auditorius, [1] . ► Rawness in the throat during cough (twenty-third day), [24] . ► Rawness in the throat provokes cough after dinner (first day), [8] . ► Throat very raw, [1] . ► Sore throat, with very much mucus in it (after forty-eight hours), [1] . ► *Sore throat, as from a lump in the left side, on swallowing (after four days), [1] . [590.] ► *Soreness of the throat, as if he swallowed over a sore spot, with at times stitches in i t, [1] . ► *Pressive soreness on the left side of the throat when swallowing , [1] . ► Swelling and tensive pain in the left side of the throat; fauces red and irritated (seventh day), [14] . ► Scraping sore throat in the morning; sticking in it in the evening, [1] . ► Roughness and scraping in the throat at night while lying on the right side in bed, on account of which she coughed for half an hour, with expectoration of mucus, several nights, [1] . ► Scratching in the throat, that provokes hacking cough, with a sensation of rawness in the bronchi, most distressing in the morning, on waking, and in the evening after lying down, for four days, [28] . ► Scraping sensation low down in the throat, in the evening (seventh day), [16a] . ► *Sticking sore throat only on swallowing, with pain in the throat, even to touch , [1] . ► Sticking in the throat when coughing, [15b] . ► Feeling as of a lump in the left side of the throat; she could only swallow with great difficulty, [32] . [600.] ► Pricking in the throat, as from a pin or needle, causing her to cough, [33] . ► Burning in the throat and chest (after six days), [15a] . ► Burning and stinging in the throat, especially when yawning and swallowing, [15c] . ► Burning in the throat, [29] . ► Violent ticking in the throat provokes cough, [15c] . ► Tickling itching in the region of the pit of the throat, that threatens suffocation until a deep shattering cough breaks out, which continues uninterruptedly for several hours, and causes pain in the lower abdomen and throat, [1] . ► Bitter taste in the throat, as if coming from the stomach, [1] . ► Nauseous sensation in the throat, in the afternoon, [1] . ► On swallowing, food gets into the choanæ, [1] . ► Sensation as if pieces of food were in the choanæ, [1] . [610.] ► Sensation of great dryness in the choanæ, [1] . ► Uvula. ► Elongation of the uvula, with dryness of the throat, [1] . ► *Uvula swollen , [4] . ► Pharynx. ► Soreness in the pharynx from singing, [1] . ► Swallowing difficult; food descends only slowly; at first a gurgling in the pharynx, that gradually descends to the stomach, three seconds after which the food descends, [1] . ► External Throat. ► Hard swelling of both parotid glands, with tensive pain on moving the head and on touch, [1] . ► Swelling of a parotid gland, with sticking pain, [1] . ► *Swelling of the submaxillary glands, painful when touched, with drawing pain in them, and with sore throat on swallowing, as from an internal swelling (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► (There recommenced a discharge from an old abscess in the submaxillary gland that had discharged years before, but was now covered with a scab), (third day), [24] . ► *Swelling of the cervical glands (after five, and twenty-five days), [1] . ► Swelling of the glands of the neck and nape of the neck (after nine days), [1] . [620.] ► Swollen cervical glands , [1] . ► The cervical muscles of the right side are swollen, [1] . ► The submaxillary glands are painful to touch but not swollen , [1] . ► Stitches in the swollen submaxillary glands (after three days), [1] . ► Violent contractive pain in the submaxillary glands (forty-first day), [24] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Sil.

abdomen.text: ABDOMEN. ► Hypochondria. ► Cramplike pain across the hypochondria, extending into the back, especially on motion (tenth day), [16] . ► A gradually drawing, dull pain in both hypochondria, extending to the spine, less at night, [1] . [740.] ► Stitches below the hypochondria (first day), [18a] . ► Stitches in the hypochondria, [3] . ► Aching pain in right hypochondrium, [29] . ► *Constant pressure in the right hypochondrium , [3] . ► A very violent dull stitch in the right hypochondrium, extending through the abdomen and out at the opposite side, sharp, together with a violent pain in the pit of the stomach, relieved by bending up, at 2.30 P.M. (fifth day), [6] . ► Some sharp, very fine (burning) stitches in the right hypochondrium, in the afternoon (fifth day), [8] . ► Umbilicus and Sides. ► Constrictive griping in the umbilical region (seventh day), [18a] . ► Colic; constrictive pain about the navel, with at times stitches; the abdomen is distended; the pains continue until there occurs a thin stool, accompanied by flatus (twelfth day), [19] . ► Constrictive pain about the navel after dinner, followed by a pasty stool thinner than usual (first day), [18] . ► Constrictive colic in the umbilical region (first day), [18a] . [750.] ► Digging sensation about the navel, in the afternoon (first day), [18] . ► Pressure beneath the umbilical region just before and during a stool, [6] . ► Pressive sensation about the navel, followed by flatulence and emission of much flatus (fifth day), [18] . ► Pressure in the umbilical region, [1] . ► Sticking pain about the navel on deep inspiration (fourth day), [19] . ► Cutting and griping about the navel, at 9.30 A.M. (first day), [8] . ► Cutting pain in the region of the navel, going right through to the back, and coming on at intervals, [32] . ► Cutting in the umbilical region from time to time (after two days), [1] . ► Pain, with cutting, about the navel and desire for stool, frequently coming and going, after midnight and in the forenoon (second day), [8] . ► Momentary pinching pain at the navel, [29] . [760.] ► Pain, like a pinching, about the navel, and afterwards in the whole of the abdomen, with the emission of much watery leucorrha, as during menses (fourth day), [8] . ► Pain beneath the right ribs posteriorly (in the region of the kidneys), in the evening, [1] . ► Violent stitches in the right side of the abdomen, with flatulence (twelfth day), [26] . ► Stitches in the right side of the abdomen (fourth day), [22] . ► Stitches in the left side of the abdomen, below the hypochondrium (seventh day), [18a] . ► Sharp stitches in the left flank (sixteenth day), [12] . ► Some stitches in the left side of the abdomen, in the evening (first day), [1] . ► Sticking pain in the left side of the abdomen, more externally, only when walking (after six hours), [6] . ► General Abdomen. ► *Abdomen constantly hard, greatly distended, making him very uncomfortable , [1] . ► *Abdomen very much distended ; no emission of flatus but eructations, [1] . [770.] ► *The abdomen became very large; it increased as usual after eating, so that it seemed constantly very tense , [1] . ► *Abdomen distended and tense (fifth night), [19] . ► Flatulent distension, so that he almost burst (thirty-eighth day), [26] . ►► *Abdomen hard, tense (sixth day), [19] . ► *The abdomen as far up as the stomach is distended (after twenty-four days), [1] . ► *Abdomen thick and heavy, like a weight , [1] . ► *Abdomen hot and tense, with rumbling and grumbling in it, with constant diarrha , [7] . ► Colic, with distension of the abdomen; the pains gradually ceased after the emission of flatus (twentieth day), [12] . ► *Flatulence, with distended abdomen , [21] . ► Flatulence, causing stitches in the small of the back, [19a] . [780.] ► Incarceration of flatus, causing contraction of the chest, at night (after twelve days), [1] . ► Frequent emission of flatus, [4] ; (eighteenth day), [14] . ►► *Very offensive flatus (second day), [1] . ► Audible movements about the abdomen, [1] . ► Audible rumbling in the abdomen after the pain had ceased, in the afternoon (fifth day), [8] . ► Rumbling in the abdomen, [19a] , [20b] ; (fourth and sixth days), [19] . ► Movements in the intestines, [20a] . ► Rumbling and gurgling in the abdomen , especially in the vicinity of an inguinal hernia (after twelve hours), [1] . ► Violent rumbling in the abdomen, [1] . ► Movements in the intestines (fourth day), [19] . [790.] ► Violent movements in the intestines after eating, with colic, followed after a short time by four watery stools, with flatulence and relief of the pain (eighth day), [18a] . ► Some colic (first day), [18a] . ► Colic (eighth day), [18] . ► Colic pains after a stool (twenty-ninth day), [24] . ► Colic before the emission of flatus, [1] . ► Colic, with great inclination to stretch, [1] . ► Colic, as from incarcerated flatus, with pressure towards the rectum, as if wind would pass, [1] . ► Colic, consisting of rumbling and constrictive pain in the abdomen, with distension, followed by emission of flatus and relief of the pain and rumbling (sixth day), [19] . ► Acute colic after eating a little at noon and in the evening, relieved after many eructations, [1] . ► Violent colic (twelfth day), [12] . [800.] ► Violent colic even after some warm beer, disappearing after rumbling in the abdomen and eructations of gas (after two days), [1] . ► Violent colic, with a feeling as though she were stiffened; the hands became yellow, the nails blue, as if dead (after five days), [1] . ► Violent, transient, griping colic nearly every afternoon, [1] . ► Griping colic before every emission of flatus, [1] . ► After a stool the colic was somewhat relieved; he was quite exhausted, fell into a light doze, from which he woke again with the most violent colic, [7] . ► Griping in the abdomen while walking in the open air (twentieth day), [1] . ► Griping, with flatulence (first day), [26] . ► Griping in the abdomen, [13] ; (second day), [16] . ► Griping-cutting pains in the abdomen, extending over the whole abdomen, [13] . ► Griping colic two hours after eating, returning from time to time, [1] . [810.] ► Feeling of fulness in the abdomen, worse in the umbilical region, feeling as if the intestines were tossed about, at times with emission of offensive flatus, with some distension of the abdomen (fifteenth day), [20] . ► After eating, everything seems too full, a feeling as if the clothes pressed him, with retraction of the abdomen, [1] . ► Some pain in the abdomen (first day), [12] . ► Pain in the abdomen, [12] , [13] , [22] , [26] . ► Pains in the upper part of the abdomen (first and fourth days), [17] . ► Pains in the abdomen, somewhat relieved by the application of warmth cloths, [3] . ► Pains in the abdomen, as if the intestines were shaken up, with gurgling noises and watery stools, without tenesmus (second day), [20] . ► After eating, pain in the abdomen, like a twisting in the intestines, [3] . ► The pains in the abdomen were relieved by the emission of flatus (fifth day), [12] . ► Constant pain in the abdomen, even with constipation, [1] . [820.] ► Violent pain in the abdomen; the child cries about his stomach day and night, [7] . ► Pressive pain in the abdomen, [1] . ► Pressure in the abdomen after eating, [3] . ► Pressure in the whole abdomen, in the morning, with rumbling and emission of flatus without relief, [3] . ► Cutting pain in the abdomen (tenth day), [16] . ► Cutting colic by paroxysms, also at night (after thirteen days), [1] . ► Cutting in the upper abdomen after dinner (after six hours), [1] . ► Cutting in the abdomen, disappearing half an hour after olfaction of Hepar sulph.; afterwards, the symptoms in the stomach and tearing in the limbs disappeared, [8] . ► Tearing in abdomen (after ten days), [1] . ► Gurgling in the intestines, [20a] . [830.] ► Twisting pain in the abdomen, [1] . ► Burning in the intestines, [1] . ► Sticking burning in the upper abdomen, in the morning after rising, lasting an hour, imperfectly relieved by stool, with pressure in the rectum, [1] . ► Hypogastrium and Iliac Regions. ► Oppression of the lower abdomen, at noon and in the evening, like a falling, partly towards the rectum, partly towards the genitals, [1] . ► Griping pains in lower abdomen, as from something that did not agree with him, [38] . ► Colicky pains in the lower bowels, with straining and increase of pain during an evacuation, [33] . ► Violent pains, like contractions, in the lower abdomen, followed by profuse perspiration all over, at night, [1] . ► *Violent cutting in the lower abdomen, with incarcerated flatus; every step is painfully felt (after lifting a light weight), [1] . ► Cutting in the lower abdomen, without diarrha, [1] . ► *Inflamed inguinal glands as large as peas, painful to touch , [1] . [840.] ► Sticking pain in the right and left iliac regions (fourth day), [19] . ► Transient violent tearing in both groins, in the evening (fifth day), [8] . ► Pain in the inguinal hernia (after two days), [1] . ► Violent sticking and contractive pains in a hernia (which he had had for a long time), [21] . ► Pain in the place of a hernia, as if something would be torn out, [1] . ► *Painfulness in the place of a hernia, with distension of the abdomen , [1] . ► Pain in the right groin, [1] . ► Tearing and drawing through the right inguinal canal, [3] . ► Sensation of swelling in the left groin, or as if a hernia were pressing out, [1] .

rectum.text: RECTUM AND ANUS. ► A vein as large as a quill protrudes from the anus, with itching and pressure (after four days), [1] . [850.] ► *The hæmorrhoids protrude excessively during the stool, return with difficulty, and with discharge of bloody mucus from the rectum , [1] . ►► *Moisture in the anus , [1] . ► Sticking pains in the hæmorrhoids, [1] . ► The hæmorrhoids which protruded with the stool became strangulated in the anus (after twenty-one days), [1] . ► *Although the hæmorrhoids protrude but little yet they are painfully sensitive (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ►► *The stool remains a long time in the rectum , as if there were no power to expel it , [1] . ► *Jerking, almost dull sticking pain in the rectum , [1] . ►► *Cutting in the rectum , [1] . ►► *Stinging in the rectum , [1] . ► *For several days burning in the rectum during stool , [1] . [860.] ► Violent stitches in the rectum, extending towards the genitals, while walking (after thirty days), [1] . ► A coarse stitch in the rectum, [1] . ► *Painful stinging-itching in the rectum during stool , [1] . ► Itching in the rectum, in the evening, [1] . ►► *Tension in the anus , [1] . ► Pressure in the anus after a soft stool, [1] . ► *Boring cramplike pain, extending from the anus into the rectum and testicles , [1] . ► Contractive pain in the anus, extending forward (into the perinæum), [1] . ►► *Pain in the anus as if constricted, during the stool , [1] . ► *Sticking in the anus (third day), [8] . [870.] ►► *Burning in the anus after a dry hard stool (fourth day), [8] . ►► *Burning in the anus (fifth day), [1] . ► Itching in the anus and hæmorrhoids, [1] . ► Frequent burning pain in the perinæum, especially after coition, [1] . ► Frequent desire for stool, from 3 to 6 P.M. (first day), [12] . ►► *Frequent desire for stool, but discharge of only mucus, with chilliness of the body , and qualmish nausea in the throat , [1] . ►► *Constant but ineffectual desire for stool , in the evening (first day), [8] . ► Desire for stool, which was copious, two hours after eating (tenth day), [16] . ► Urging to stool, which was copious and rather soft (second day), [16] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Sil.

urinary.text: URINARY ORGANS. ► He feels a weakness in the urinary organs, constant desire to urinate, [35] . ► Pressure upon the bladder while urinating, followed by burning, [3] . ► Constant fine stitches in the forepart of the urethra, [1] . ► Cutting pain in urinating, [39] . ► Cutting during micturition (sixteenth day), [1] . ► Burning in the urethra while urinating, [1] . [930.] ► Burning pain during micturition, for several days (after ten days), [18a] . ► Smarting in the urethra while urinating, [1] . ► Constant desire to urinate, the urine was passed guttatim, with violent burning pain in the urethra, for three days (after fourteen days), [8] . [Smelling of the spirits of Camphor and even a dose of a few drops had no effect, neither had olfaction of Hepar sulph.; but a drop of the 12th dilution of Cantharides gradually removed the intolerable pains.] ► Desire to urinate, with copious discharge, [4] . ► Desire to urinate, with scanty discharge, [4] . ► Urging to urinate, with smarting in the urethra, [1] . ► Frequent desire to urinate, [1] . ► Desire to urinate, with erections, at night, [4] . ► Frequent ineffectual efforts to urinate, [1] . ► Involuntary micturition while sitting, after urinating, [1] . [940.] ► Awoke at night to urinate (sixth night), [27] . ► He woke at night in sweat, with desire to urinate, [1] . ► He was obliged to urinate every quarter of an hour, about 7 A.M., for several days, [1] . ► Obliged to rise nearly every night to urinate , [4] . ► Frequent scanty emission of urine without pain (fifth day), [8] . ► Did not rise to urinate at night as usual (first day), [9] . ► Urine scanty, with burning during the evacuation, in the afternoon (fifth day), [8] . ► Urine red (tenth day), [18a] . ► Urine hot, burning, pale yellow, [3] . ► The urine is very sedimentous, [39] . [950.] ► Urine very turbid, [29] . ► The urine speedily becomes turbid, [1] . ► Red sandy sediment in the urine, [1] . ► Profuse red sandy sediment in the urine (twenty-first day), [25] . ► The urine deposits a yellow sand, [1] . ► Yellow gritty sediment in the urine (first days), [1] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Frequent stitches through the genitals (thirty-third day), [25] . ► Distressing itching in the genitals while urinating, [1] . ► Frequent violent erections during the day, without apparent cause (first days), [1] . ► *Violent erections at night , without sexual desire, [1] . [960.] ► Violent erections, with relaxed scrotum (after five days), [1] . ► Violent erections, with drawing pain in the testicles, [1] . ► Erections follow slowly (after twenty-three days), [1] . ► No erections, even no trace of them (after several days), [1] . ► Redness about the corona glandis, as if denuded of skin, with frequent itching, [1] . ► Swelling of the prepuce, with itching moist pimples externally, [1] . ► Itching and red spots on the glans penis, [1] . ► Sharp pricking pains in the penis, for ten minutes, [29] . ► Burning pain in the prepuce after a stool, [1] . ► Itching beneath the prepuce, [1] . [970.] ► *Hydrocele , [7] . ► *Itching and a moist spot on the scrotum , [1] . ► Crawling on the scrotum, [1] . ► The testicles are painful, worse at night, but only when lying down, [1] . ► Pain in the right testicle as if it were indurated, [1] . ► Distending or compressing pain in the left testicle, as from great swelling, [1] . ► Jerking pains in the left testicle, [13] . ► Pressure in the spermatic cords, with the testicles hanging down relaxed (first days), [1] . ► Dragging from the prostate gland forward, [3] . ► Sexual desire increased with erections (after twenty-one days), [1] . [980.] ► Sexual desire greatly excited the first eight days, erections every half hour, day and night, with retracted testicles, [1] . ► *Lascivious thoughts (first and second days), [1] . ► Lascivious thoughts, in the morning in bed, with erections (first to fourteenth day), [1] . ► Sexual desire very weak, almost lost (first five weeks), [1] . ► *Sexual desire very weak (the first three weeks), [1] . ► Diminished sexual desire and fewer erections, [29] . ► *Emissions first night , and frequently afterwards, [1] . ► Frequent and profuse emissions, [1] . ► Emissions with heavy dreams, in a married man (first night), [1] . ► Several emissions, [29] . [990.] ► *Nocturnal emission , with sweat on the back, and waking about 2 A.M., [1] . ► Discharge of prostatic fluid with every stool, [1] . ► *Discharge of prostatic fluid while straining at stool , [1] . ► Female. ► Painful eruption of pimples on the mons veneris, [1] . ► The child of a pregnant woman moves very much, [1] . ► Discharge of much white water from the uterus, with violent itching of the pudenda, [1] . ► Profuse watery leucorrha after urinating, preceded by pain in the abdomen (ninth day), [8] . ► Profuse leucorrha, [30] . ► Profuse leucorrhal discharge, [33] . ► *The leucorrha causes biting pain , especially after acid food, [1] . [1000.] ► Discharge of a quantity of white watery fluid from the vagina, quite unlike ordinary leucorrha, [41] . ► Leucorrha, in the evening (sixth day), [8] . ► Some discharge of blood at the time of the new moon, for several days, eleven days before the right time for the menses, [1] . ► Discharge of bloody mucus from the vagina, almost immediately after the menses, [1] . ► *Bearing-down pains in the vagina , [1] . ► *Itching of the pudenda , [3] . ► *Violent burning and soreness of the pudenda, with eruption on the inner sides of the thighs, during the menses (after twenty-three days), [1] . ► Reappearance of the menses, that had been absent for three months, [1] . ► *Menses increased (after thirteenth and twentieth days), [1] . ► Menses increased, with repeated attacks of icy coldness over the whole body on their appearance, [1] . [1010.] ► Menses three days too early (after five days), [1] . ► Menses two days too early (after seven days), [1] . ► Menses five days late, [1] . ► The menses continued only five days, were very scanty and without pain (they usually last ten to fourteen days), [8] . ► Menses delayed three or four days (after eighteen days), [1] . ► Menses delayed five days, without other symptoms, [8] . ► Very strong odor to the menstrual blood, [1] . ► Diminished discharge of blood during the menses, [1] . ► Silicea taken during the menses seems to suppress them for four days, afterwards they flow for four or five days and then remain away for six weeks, [1] . ► *Menses suppressed , [8] .

Suppuration of kidneys ; abscesses. Diabetes mellitus. Purulent blennorrhœa of bladder. Tenesmus of bladder and anus. Paralysis of bladder. Obliged to rise nearly every night to urinate. Desire to urinate without emission. Continuous urging, with scanty discharge ; also at night. Weakness in urinary organs ; constant desire to urinate. Profuse urination relieves headache. Involuntary micturition at night ; also in children, with worms and in chorea. Nightly incontinence of urine, after a blow upon head, when three years old, in a girl æt. 7. A boy, æt. 15, troubled ever since his recollection with nocturnal enuresis nearly every night, until he was thirteen, when he left home ; by a strong effort of will and care it was not so frequent, but still quite beyond his control. Enuresis nocturna, complicated with worms or chorea. Urine : light-colored ; suppressed ; turbid ; sediment of red or yellow sand. During urination : burning and soreness in urethra ; pressure in bladder ; itching of vulva ; cutting pain. Strangury. After urination : involuntary discharge of urine. Suppression of urine. Renal and vesical calculus.
Bloody, involuntary, with red or yellow sediment. Prostatic fluid discharged when straining at stool. Nocturnal enuresis in children with worms

respiratory.text: RESPIRATORY ORGANS. [1020.] ► Sensation of soreness like rawness in the larynx, when breathing, [1] . ► Pain in the region of the larynx, when lifting a heavy weight, [1] . ► Tickling in the larynx with slight cough and hoarseness, [29] . ► Voice. ► *Hoarseness (first day), [2] ; (sixth day), [14] ; (about six hours after tincture), [15c] . ► Hoarseness while talking, [15b] . ► Constant hoarseness, with a painful sensation as if the throat were internally swollen, [13c] . ► Hoarseness, especially in the morning, so that she could scarcely speak aloud (after six days), [15a] . ► Hoarseness, with frequent, dry, hacking cough (after three days), [1] . ► Cough and Expectoration. ► Cough at night (after fifteen days), [1] . ► Cough in the morning and after going to bed, [1] . [1030.] ► Cough, for five weeks, [1] . ► *Cough, with hoarseness (nineteenth day), [1] . ► Hoarse cough (after six days), [15a] . ► Frequent irritation to cough (twentieth day), [25] . ► Spasmodic cough (after twelve days), [1] . ► *Cough at first caused by tickling in the throat, gradually seeming to come from lower down in the throat, till on the thirty-first day it came from the chest and shook the abdomen, during the day consisting of sudden explosive coughs without expectoration, in the evening the cough became worse (thirty-first day), [25] . ► *Cough especially troublesome, after lying down in the evening and after waking in the morning for eleven days , [1] . ► *Slight cough and hoarseness, with tickling in the larynx , [29] . ► Cough very violent, with lachrymation (twelfth and thirteenth days); the cough continued during the succeeding days, after two days it was very violent, especially after laughter, with sticking pain below the angle of the scapula and in the middle of the sternum on coughing; the cough was worse in the morning, with stitches in the chest, more in the middle of the sternum than at the sides, with stitches in the middle of the sternum on inspiration; *with the morning cough there was a thick yellow expectoration ; during the day the expectoration was insignificant; the morning cough occurred on rising from bed; in the evening it occurred at 9 P.M., on going to bed, lasting from one-half to three-quarters of an hour, without expectoration and without pain; nose very much stopped; could not breathe through the nose; this influenza continued several days, and after two days was associated * with difficulty of hearing, at times with ringing in the ears , with profuse white slimy discharge from the nose, cough diminished, thick yellow expectoration, cough and expectoration worse after rising, seldom in the evening and through the day (on account of this attack the proving was suspended), [19] . ► Frequent cough towards evening, without expectoration (thirty-second day), [25] . [1040.] ► Distressing cough at night, till 4 A.M. (after five days), [1] . ► Violent cough without expectoration, in the morning (thirty-third day), [25] . ► Cough caused by tickling in the throat (twenty-sixth day); becoming worse day by day; on the twenty-eighth day there was a greenish lumpy expectoration, and afterwards always on coughing in the morning the same expectoration; but throughout the day frequent cough without expectoration, [25] . ► Cough from morning till evening, with tickling and expectoration of mucus, also mucous expectoration without cough (twenty-second day), [24] . ► For two evenings, cough lasting all night, with fever, disappearing after warming the abdomen, [1] . ► Cough, with shattering in the abdomen (twenty-ninth day), [25] . ► Cough, with scraping in the throat, leaving a rawness (twenty-first day), [24] . ► *Fatiguing cough, with rattling of mucus, in the evening in bed , [1] . ► Cough, with vomiting, when expectorating, [1] . ► Talking always causes cough, [1] . [1050.] ► *Cough caused by tickling and irritation in the throat , [1] . ► Cough only on lying down at night and in the morning, [1] . ► Cough that causes vomiting of mucus, [1] . ► *Hacking cough caused by nightly tickling in the pharynx , [1] . ► *Hacking cough, caused by irritability in the throat (twenty-second day), [25] . ► Fatiguing cough, without expectoration (thirty-first day), [25] . ► Frequent dry cough (twenty-sixth day), [25] . ► *Frequent dry hacking cough (after three days), [1] . ► *Dry cough, that frequently wakes her at night, and also returns several times during the day (after four days), [8] . ► Dry cough, with painfulness in the upper part of the sternum, in the morning after waking (sixth day), [8] . [1060.] ► Dry cough, caused by cold drinks, [1] . ► Frequent dry cough, only in short paroxysms, [1] . ► Dry spasmodic cough, at intervals of a quarter of an hour, with great rawness in the chest and throat, [1] . ► *Much dry hacking cough, causing soreness in the chest , [1] . ► Dry cough without pain (fifth night), [19] . ► Short, dry, hacking cough, [30] . ► Dry and hacking cough, [32] . ► Hoarse, dry cough, [36] . ► *Dry cough, even to vomiting, with anxious sweat at night; obliged to rise from bed , [1] . ► Violent persistent cough, with expectoration of much transparent mucus, [1] . [1070.] ► *Violent cough with expectoration, on lying down in bed ; the expectoration, thick, yellow, lumpy (seventh day), [18a] . ► Cough, especially after eating, with expectoration of white mucus, [1] . ► Cough and expectoration for sixteen days, with painful scraping in the chest, disinclination to work, fretfulness and weariness of the whole body, [1] . ► *Constant cough for several months; expectoration of much thick purulent mucus, in the morning and forenoon; large lumps of yellow mucus expectorated with painfulness in the trachea and chest, as if sore , [11] . ► Cough and expectoration, with scraping in the pit of the throat (ninth day), [18a] . ► Cough, especially between 8 and 9 A.M., with expectoration of mucus and scraping in the throat (eighteenth day), [24] . ► Hacking cough with easy expectoration, in the morning (eighth day), [18a] . ► Cough, with yellowish green expectoration, from 7 to 10 A.M. (twenty-fourth day), [24] . ► Much expectoration in the morning and during the day, at times salt, at times offensive and brownish, [1] . ► Expectoration of bright blood, with deep hollow cough, towards noon; soon followed by attacks of faintness (fourth day), [1] . [1080.] ► Expectoration of bloody mucus, [1] . ► Bloody expectoration with violent cough, in the morning (after seven days), [1] . ► Expectoration of mucus from the trachea, immediately after eating, [3] . ► Much mucous expectoration without cough, in the morning, [4] . ►► *Purulent expectoration when coughing , [7] . ► *Purulent expectoration of large masses by vomiting, which is provoked by the cough , [7] . ► *Thick purulent expectoration of mucus from the trachea , [3] . ► *Greenish-yellow expectoration of offensive balls of mucus raised by hawking , [1] . ► *The expectoration makes the water turbid; that which sinks to the bottom has an offensive odor , [1] . ► Respiration. ► Frequent deep sighing respiration, [1] . [1090.] ► Dyspna, in the morning on waking (after seventeen days), [1] .

VOICE AND LARYNX. TRACHEA AND BRONCHIA. [25] [Sil.]. Hoarseness, roughness of larynx. Husky voice ; < in morning ; chronic coryza. Fibrous, painless swelling of larynx, connected with thyroid cartilage. Foreign bodies in larynx. Laryngeal morning cough commencing immediately on rising, with tough, gelatinous and very tenacious expectoration. Bronchial affections of rachitic children ; copious purulent or transparent expectoration. Tickling in larynx with slight cough and hoarseness. Roughness and soreness in trachea and bronchia. Deep sighing breathing. Shortness of breath and panting from walking fast, or from manual labor. Dyspnœa : when lying on back ; when stooping ; when running ; also after running ; when coughing. Oppression of chest, cannot take a long breath. Asthma : < when lying down ; spasmodic cough ; spasm of larynx ; pulsations in chest ; often with profuse, purulent sputa ; cannot bear a draft of air on back of neck. Nervous asthma, dry spasmodic cough ; oppression does not permit him to lie down or stoop ; spasm of larynx and pulsations in chest. Breathing so difficult that eyes seemed to protrude from their sockets and the doors and windows had to be thrown open ; attacks came only during a thunderstorm. Hay asthma coming on about the last of August. Cough : dry, with hoarseness ; with soreness in chest ; excited by tickling in throat pit ; hollow, spasmodic ; loose, day and night ; with profuse expectoration vomiting of tenacious mucus in morning ; with thick purulent sputa ; awakens him at night ; < from motion ; scanty mucous expectoration ; especially troublesome after lying down in evening and after waking in morning ; hacking caused by nightly tickling in pharynx ; at first caused by tickling in throat, gradually seeming to come from lower down in throat until it came from chest and shook the abdomen, during day consisting of sudden explosive coughs without expectoration, < in evening. Cough and sore throat with expectoration of small badly smelling granules. Cough with purulent expectoration ; prevented the ulcers in lungs from spreading. Phthisis ; cough with profuse expectoration, vomiting of tenacious mucus in morning, during attack of cough ; dyspnœa ; blood-spitting ; night sweats. Child 3 years old, strongly marked scrofulous constitution ; suffocative cough ; obstructed, difficult, rattling respiration ; profuse expectoration of purulent matter ; great emaciation ; frequent, copious, fetid, papescent stools, with great exhaustion ; slight pustular eruption, (similar to varicella) upon forehead. Cough < from cold, > from warm drinks. θ Chronic bronchitis. Influenza with difficulty of hearing, at times ringing in ears. Stonecutters' pulmonary affections, copious fetid expectoration. After artificial evacuation of an empyema continuing suppuration, hectic fever, emaciation, night sweats and diarrhœa. θ Phthisis. Expectoration : profuse, fetid, purulent, green ; only during day ; of viscid, milky, acrid mucus ; at times pale frothy blood ; tastes greasy ; makes water turbid, that which sinks to bottom has an offensive odor ; when thrown into water falls to bottom and spreads like a heavy sediment.

Colds fail to yield; sputum persistently muco-purulent and profuse. Slow recovery after pneumonia. Cough and sore throat, with expectoration of little granules like shot, which, when broken, smell very offensive. Cough with expectoration in day, bloody or purulent. Stitches in chest through to back. Violent cough when lying down, with thick, yellow lumpy expectoration; suppurative stage of expectoration (Bals. Peru)

[1720.] ► Starting up in the midday sleep (twelfth day), [1] . ► Jerking upward of the body at night during sleep without dreams, for half an hour (after four days), [1] . ► She stands up while asleep, climbs over a chair, table, and piano, and then lies down in bed without knowing anything of it, [1] . ► Jerking and starting in sleep, with frequent rushes of blood to the head, [32] . ► Sleeplessness. ►► *Restless sleep (fifth and sixteenth days), [15] ; (fifteenth day), [22] ; (forty-seventh day), [23] . ► Frequently interrupted sleep at night (seventh day), [15] . ► Extremely restless night on account of cutting pains in the abdomen that intermit for only a short time (after three days), [8] . ► The boy is restless at night and cries out, [1] . ► *Restless sleep and frequent waking, with chilliness , [1] . ► *Uneasy sleep, with frequent waking, and many dreams crowding one upon another , [4] . [1730.] ► *Restless sleep without pain , [1] . ► She slept uneasily, started up, and talked in sleep, [1] . ► Night restless, with anxious dreams (fourteenth day), [25] . ► *Woke at 2 A.M. and could not fall asleep again on account of rush of thoughts , [4] . ► He woke very often and started up without dreaming, [1] . ► Frequent waking, with uneasiness and chilliness, though without dreams, [1] . ► Frequently woke, and after midnight could sleep no more, [1] . ► He woke about 11 P.M. after a sleep of an hour and a half, and then fell asleep again for several nights, [4] . ► He woke often after midnight, and on falling asleep about 2 or 3 o'clock, he fell into a reverie, [1] . ► Anxious waking, about 3 A.M., [1] . [1740.] ► Frequent waking at night, and scarcely had he fallen asleep again when he dreamed of his business, [4] . ► She woke at 2 A.M. and could not fall asleep again (after seven days), [8] . ► Woke earlier than usual in the morning (twenty-ninth day), [25] . ► The boy wakes at night with violent weeping, cannot collect his senses, cries anxiously, and mumbles, [1] . ► Frequent starting up at night, [1] . ► The whole body starts up with fright, and waking in the evening after falling asleep, [1] . ► *Starting from sleep at night, with trembling of the whole body , [1] . ► *Frequent starting up in fright, with sleepiness in the afternoon , [1] . ► Difficulty of falling asleep (fifteenth day), [13] . ► Unable to fall asleep before midnight (seventh day), [18a] . [1750.] ► Unable to fall asleep for an hour and a half on account of rush of ideas, two evenings (after seven days), [1] . ► Inability to sleep in the afternoon, the nose was so much stopped, could not breathe (twelfth day), [19] . ► Inability to sleep till towards morning (eighth day), [19] . ► *Extreme sleeplessness , [34] , [29] . ► Complete loss of sleep for eight or ten days, even after she had no more pains (after two days), [8] . ► She lay wide awake all night; no sleep came to her eyes, [1] . ► She lay all night without sleep, only absorbed in wonderful fancies and reveries, [1] . ► Complete loss of sleep for eight to ten days, [1] . ► *Loss of sleep at night , [1] . ► Dreams. ► *Much dreaming at night and crying out in sleep , [1] . [1760.] ► *Restless dreams for several nights, even loud talking in sleep , [23] . ► She dreams about murders, and horrid things of that sort, [32] . ► Dreams of earthquakes and frightful storms, of fire, etc. (tenth day), [16] . ► Dreams of a flood, with great anxiety, [13] . ► Frightful dreams during the first part of the night, [1] . ►► *Frightful dreams (twelfth day), [12] . ► Dream of a ghost that pursued him, after midnight (after thirteen days), [1] . ► Dream that he must die, [3] . ► Nightmare while half awake, with great anxiety, as if a smoky beast of a hundred weight were lying upon him, so that he could not stir nor utter a loud sound, [1] . ► A kind of somnambulistic dream; he saw very vividly far-distant regions which he had never really seen, and objects which he had desired to have (after eight days), [1] . [1770.] ► *Confused dreams at night, and frequent uneasy waking , [1] . ► Confused dreams of everything that had happened, or that he had heard during the day, [1] . ► Numerous historical and amorous dreams at night, [1] . ► Dreams of robbers and murderers, during which he woke and said he would catch them, [1] . ► Disgusting offensive dreams, [4] . ► Dreams full of quarrels and humiliation (after four days), [1] . ► Dreams and raves much during the night, stands up and walks about the room without knowing where he is for a long time, [1] . ► Dreams full of reveries; he gets out of bed like a somnambulist, [1] . ► *Dreams and reveries as soon as she falls asleep , [1] . ► A half-waking dream, as if numerous ghosts were about him; he woke and could not move a limb, but lay in sweat, with great anxiety and palpitation, followed by great fearfulness (after twelve days), [1] . [1780.] ► Dreams of the occurrences of his childhood, [4] . ►► *Dreams of his youth , waking him from sleep, and so vivid that on waking he could, with difficulty, free himself from them , [4] . ► *Vivid dreams of past events , [4] . ► Dreams of the occurrences of the day and of large dogs that followed him, [4] . ► Many dreams of distant journeys, [9] . ► In a dream he seems to have an epileptic attack, and his head is drawn to one side (after thirteen days), [1] . ► Dreams full of cruelty, without anger, [1] . ► Vexatious dreams, [1] . ► *Frightful fancies immediately after falling asleep; sleep full of fright, and crying aloud , [1] . ► *Bad dreams, with violent weeping , [1] , [3] . [1790.] ► A dream of being murdered, from which he woke, with great anxiety, as if he would suffocate, without being able to speak (after fifteen days), [1] . ► Disconnected dreams at night (second night), [2] . ► Her head seemed excessively large during the nightly fantasies, [1] . ► Dream of being seized by a finger, so that he woke in fright, [1] . ► Anxious dream of being pursued, [1] . ► Anxious dreams of snakes (after five days), [1] . ► Anxious dream that he had committed a murder and was apprehended, [1] . ► *Anxious dreams of one choking her ; she could not cry out, could only kick with the feet, [1] . ► Anxious dream of drowning, [1] . ► Anxious dream of robbers, with whom he fought; he woke in heat, anxious oppression, and sweat, [1] . [1800.] ► Amorous dreams of marriage, [1] . ► Lascivious dreams, with great sexual desire (after thirteen days), [1] . ► *Lascivious dreams, with emissions (second night), [1] . ► Lascivious dreams (fifth night), [1] . ► Lascivious dreams in the evening and in the morning, in bed, with erections, [4] . ► Lascivious dreams of being disturbed during coition, waking with erection and sexual fancy (after six hours), [1] . ► Lascivious dreams, very offensive to her, [1] . ► He dreams less than usual, [4] .

Excessive gaping. Drowsiness with lassitude and depression. Sleepiness : after eating ; in evening. Restless sleep : frequent waking with chilliness ; dreams crowding one upon another ; starting with trembling of whole body. Woke at 2 A. M. and could not fall asleep again on account of rush of thoughts. During sleep : whining and laughing ; loud talking ; starts, jerkings of limbs, snoring ; night sweats ; nightmare. Night walking ; gets up while asleep, walks about and lies down again ; somnambulism. Child wakes and throws arms about and screams. θ Scarlatina. Sleep walking at new and full moon. θ Lumbricoid worms. Sleepy but cannot sleep. Sleepless ; from ebullitions, orgasm of blood. Sleeplessness or sleep broken by lascivious or frightening dreams ; heat and congestions. Sleeplessness with tuberculosis. Dreams : pleasant ; lascivious ; anxious, of murders, horrid things ; vivid of past events ; with violent weeping ; of some one choking her. Night sweats ; obstinate morning headache ; chilly, nauseated. Erections and urging to urinate awake him. Feels unrefreshed, wishes to remain in bed.
Night-walking; gets up while asleep. Sleeplessness, with great orgasm of blood and heat in head. Frequent starts in sleep. Anxious dreams. Excessive gaping

fever.text: FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► Violent chill, especially in the shoulders, in the evening, [3] . ►► *Very chilly all day , [1] . [1810.] ► Very chilly in a hot room, without thirst, all the forenoon (third day), [8] . ► Chilliness after eating (twenty-fourth day), [1] . ► Constant chilliness in the evening, even noticed externally, [3] . ► Constant internal chilliness, with loss of appetite, [1] . ► Constant chilliness, with occasional slight feverishness, [29] . ► *Constant internal chilliness from taking cold at night, with loss of appetite and sticking-burning headache, [1] . ►► *Chilliness on every movement all day; in the morning great weariness, even to falling asleep , [1] . ► *Chilly at night while half awake , without waking, [1] . ► Febrile chill, lasting till 8.30 P.M. (nineteenth day), [12] . ► Febrile chill, [13] . [1820.] ► General feverish condition; chilliness in the evening (ninth day); during the day (tenth day); in the evening (eleventh day), [27] . ► *Violent incessant internal chilliness for several days , [1] . ► Chilliness, with sleepiness, after eating (thirteenth day), [14] . ►► *Chilliness in the evening (ninth day); all day (tenth day), [27] . ► General feeling of chilliness, [38] . ► Chilliness, with sticking pain, [1] . ►► *Distressing sensation of chilliness in the afternoon , especially on the arms , in a warm room , [1] . ► *Chilliness, even while walking in a warm room, and in the open air so violent that he trembled (after thirty-two hours), [1] . ►► *He feels very chilly, even in a warm room , [29] . ►► *Cramplike chill, in the evening in bed, so that he shivered (fourteenth day), [1] . [1830.] ► *She did not dare to put her hand out of bed on account of consequent chilliness, at night and next day (after three days), [8] . ► Alternations of chill and heat frequently during the day, [1] . ► At one time very chilly, again exceedingly hot, [32] . ► *Shaking chill, at 5 P.M ., after some bread and beer (seventh day), [18a] . ► *Shaking chill; was obliged to lie down and could not get warm for a long time in bed, at 6 P.M . (third day), [8] . ► *Icy-cold shivering frequently creeps over the whole body , [1] . ► Shivering for half an hour frequently during the day, followed by some heat, mostly in the head and face, [1] . ► Shivering all over; a cold, starved feel; if he sat ever so near the fire he could not get warm, [42] . ► Icy-cold feeling of the entire body, as though exposed to a cold climate suddenly, [33] . ► Coldness, with ravenous hunger, at night (fifteenth day), [27] . [1840.] ► Strange coldness, about the breadth of two fingers, across the vertex, in a line with the forepart of both ears, [32] . ► The nose became as cold as ice, [32] . ► Chilliness all down the back, [32] . ► Chilliness in the back, [1] . ► Chilliness at first going down the back, with icy-cold hands, followed by violent heat, with tension of the abdomen, [1] . ► Shiverings in one shoulder (thirteenth day), [25] . ► Coldness of the knees and arms after walking in the open air; the finger-nails become white, [1] . ► *The legs, as far as the knees and the feet, are icy cold in the evening, and he is obliged to lie in bed half an hour before they get warm, many days in succession , [1] . ►► *Coldness of the legs, as far as the knees, in a warm room , [1] . ► *Icy-cold feet during the day; but at night in bed burning heat of the feet and hands, with drawing pain in the feet as far as the knees , [1] . [1850.] ►► *Icy-cold feet in the evening, even in bed , [4] . ►► *Icy-cold feet during the menses , [1] . ►► *Icy-coldness of the feet , [40] . ► *Cold feet all day , [4] . ►► Cold feet in the evening in bed, preventing sleep , [1] . ► Cold feet, that become warm at night, every day, [1] . ► The feet are cold when beginning to walk, [1] . ► Heat. ► Fever, with great chilliness, at 11 A.M. (fifteenth day), [12] . ► Fever lasting till 7.30 P.M., after which all the limbs seem paralyzed (twentieth day), [42] . ►► *Fever, with violent heat in the head , dark redness of the face, and thirst, four days in succession, from noon till evening; headache began half an hour before the heat, [1] . [1860.] ► The intermittent fever of Silicea has little sweat, usually occurring from 10 A.M. to 8 P.M., or from midnight to 8 A.M., [7] . ► Fever in the evening after lying down, violent chill, so that she could not get warm in bed, and therefrom pain in the stomach (after sixteen hours), [1] . ► *Febrile attack in the evening ; heat all over without subsequent perspiration, [1] . ► Febrile paroxysms in the afternoon, consisting only of heat and frightful thirst, with very short breath, [7] . ►► *Febrile heat all night, with violent thirst and catching respiration , [7] . ► Burning heat in the whole body, in a child, during the fever, with red, puffy face, glands hard, like peas, about the throat and down the shoulders, with distension of the abdomen and constant diarrha, [7] . ► Dry heat and thirst for several evenings, followed by pain in the abdomen and head, [1] . ► Heat without thirst (twenty-second day), [1] . ► Frequent transient flushes of heat during the day, [1] . ► A not unpleasant warmth through the whole body for two days, [1] . [1870.] ► Much heat, [3] . ► Heat in the head, as if flames of fire were coming out of the mouth, in the evening (twenty-sixth day), [26] . ► Heat of the head, with anxiety, [1] . ►► *Heat of the head , [1] ; (fifth and sixth days), [18] . ► Heat in the face and lobules of the ears many evenings, [1] . ► *Frequent flushes of heat in the face and whole body, followed by perspiration, even during rest; then on the slightest movement she is covered with perspiration , [1] . ► Great heat and redness of the face, with very cold hands and feet, [1] . ► Great heat in the face after eating, [1] . ► Heat and burning in the face after washing with cold water, for two hours, [1] . ► Heat of the cheeks and palms of the hands, in the morning, [1] . [1880.] ► Heat in the lobules of the ears, and on the head (after eight days), [1] . ► Sweat. ► Heavy sweats, [33] . ► Sweat over the whole body (sixth day), [18] . ►► *General sweat at night (sixth night), [27] . ► *Profuse trickling sweat at night, especially on the loins , [4] . ►► *Profuse perspiration every night, towards morning , [1] . ►► *Profuse general nightsweat , [4] . ►► *Profuse perspiration every night, with loss of appetite and prostration, as if he would go into a decline , [1] . ►► *General perspiration, at night in bed , [4] . ►► *Nightsweat , especially on the trunk , [4] . [1890.] ►► *Perspiration over the whole body, every night in bed (first nights), [1] . ► Heavy perspirations night and day, [36] . ► *Sweat in the morning , [1] . ► Perspiration while eating and talking, [1] . ►► *Perspiration of a strong odor , [1] . ►► *Sweat on the head (seventh day), [18] . ►► *Sweat only on the head, running down the face , [7] . ► Nightly perspiration on the chest, [1] . ► Sweat first appeared on both sides of the spine, he then became warm over the whole upper part of the body, afterwards sweat broke out on the face, especially on the forehead (seventh day), [18a] . ► *Sweat on the scrotum, in the evening , [1] . [1900.] ► *Sweat on the scrotum; it itches all over , [1] . ► *Profuse sweat on the hands , [1] . ►► *Offensive perspiration on the soles and between the toes; they become quite sore while walking , [1] . ►► *Offensive perspiration on the feet , [1] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), Weeping; forgetful and dizzy; on rising, vertigo; dizziness and whirling; on rising from bed, reeling; pressive headache; after rising, headache in forehead; sticking and throbbing in forehead; pressure in occiput and nape of neck; eyes painful; agglutination of the eyes; biting in the canthi; on waking, dry catarrh; toothache; bad odor from the mouth; bitter taste; taste of blood, bad taste; ravenous hunger; sour, bitter eructations; nausea and qualmishness; twisting, etc. in pit of stomach; pressure in abdomen; hoarseness; after washing, cough; cough; dyspna; pressure in abdomen; hoarseness; pressure upon scapula; swelling of the feet; on rising, pains in the bones. ► ( Forenoon ), Distraction of mind; 10 A.M., to 8 P.M., fever. ► ( Afternoon ), 3 to 9 P.M., headache; tearing and sticking in head; throbbing frontal headache; griping colic; fever. ► ( Evening ), While sitting and standing, vertigo; jerking through head; headache in forehead; acid eructations; itching in rectum; after lying down, cough; in bed, biting in legs and arms; chilliness; cold feet. ► ( Night ), Rush of blood to the head; headache; pressive headache; agglutination of the eyes; toothache; roughness and scraping in throat; pains in lower abdomen; pain in testicles; cough; drawing between scapula; sweat. ► ( Cold air ), Stitches in teeth. ► ( Deep breathing ), Stitches in chest; pain beneath left ribs; sticking pains. ► ( Eating ), Toothache. ► ( After eating ), Difficult hearing; pain in abdomen; pressure in abdomen; cough; oppression of chest. ► ( Lying of left side ), Vertigo. ► ( During menses ), Anxiety in pit of stomach; cold feet. ► ( At new moon ), Most symptoms. ► ( Motion ), Tearing headache in forehead; pain in sinciput; pain in temples; pain in left side of head; pain across hypochondria; stiffness of left arm; pain. ► ( Pressure ), Pain in left side of head. ► ( Reflection ), Vertigo. ► ( Rest ), Vertigo; pressure upon scapulæ. ► ( On rising ), Vertigo. ► ( Sitting ), Vertigo; headache in forehead; stiffness of back; tearing in knees; tearing pain in legs. ► ( Standing ), Palpitation; pain in feet. ► ( Stooping ), Vertigo, headache in forehead; pain in temples; nosebleed; pain in small of back; pain in left hip. ► ( Storm ), Exhaustion. ► ( Swallowing ), Crackling in ear. ► ( Talking ), Headache in forehead. ► ( Turning suddenly ), Headache in forehead. ► ( While urinating ), Cutting, burning, and smarting in urethra. ► ( On waking ), Anxiety. ► ( Walking ), Vertigo; pinching in the head; headache in forehead; sticking pain in left side of abdomen; stitches in rectum; oppression of chest; pain in feet; tearing in feet. ► ( Walking in open air ), Nausea; pressure in stomach; griping in abdomen; heaviness of extremities. ► ( Warmth ), Pain in legs. ► Amelioration. ► ( Binding head tightly ), Tearing pain in head. ► ( Motion ), Tearing in knees. ► ( Riding in open air ), Vertigo.
